baseline.runtime: Supported Python version with pinned dependencies and type hints on public interfaces.
baseline.api_contract: FastAPI schema generated from Pydantic models with explicit validation and error responses.
baseline.data: Migration-backed persistence with constraints, ownership checks, and transaction boundaries.

freshness_policy: Verify current Python support status, FastAPI docs, Pydantic docs, package index metadata, lockfile or pinning behavior, and security dependency docs before implementation.
